title: Room presence and chat relay over WebSocket

difficulty.rationale: Requires stateful management of multiple WebSocket connections grouped by room, broadcasting presence updates to the right subset of sockets, enforcing strict room isolation, excluding the sender on chat fan-out, and removing users on disconnect with no leaked roster entries.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: A joining socket receives a presence message listing all current room members sorted.
Other sockets in the room receive an updated presence message when a user joins.
GET /rooms/:room returns the current sorted roster for that room.
A chat message reaches other members of the same room only.
must_not: Deliver a message or presence update across different rooms.
Echo a chat message back to the sender.
Leave a disconnected user in the roster.
edge_cases: On disconnect remaining members receive presence without the departed user.
GET /rooms/:room on an empty or unknown room returns an empty users list.
Connecting without room or user does not upgrade and returns 400.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
